name: SCM Agent
description: Multi-provider Source Code Manager. Supports GitHub and Bitbucket Server; extensible to GitLab and others.

skills.name: Repository Search
skills.description: Search for repositories by name or keyword across the configured SCM provider.

skills.name: Repository Inspect
skills.description: Fetch repository metadata, default branch, and branch list.

skills.name: List Branches
skills.description: List all branches in a repository.

skills.name: Create Branch
skills.description: Create a new branch from a given ref.

skills.name: List Pull Requests
skills.description: List open (or filtered) pull requests in a repository.

skills.name: Get Pull Request
skills.description: Fetch details of a single PR, including linked Jira issues extracted from title/description/branch.

skills.name: Create Pull Request
skills.description: Create a pull request from one branch to another.

skills.name: Add PR Comment
skills.description: Add a general or inline comment to a pull request.

skills.name: List PR Comments
skills.description: List all comments on a pull request.

skills.name: Git Push Files
skills.description: Commit and push one or more files to a branch via HTTPS.

skills.name: Git Clone (async)
skills.description: Clone a repository to a shared workspace path. Supports depth and full_history options. Returns immediately; notifies via callback when done.

skills.name: Read Remote File
skills.description: Read a single file from a remote repository branch/ref via API. Does not require a local clone.

skills.name: List Remote Directory
skills.description: List the contents of a directory in a remote repository branch/ref via API. Does not require a local clone.

skills.name: Search Code
skills.description: Search for code matching a query within a repository.

skills.name: Compare Refs
skills.description: Compare two branches or commit SHAs. Returns ahead/behind stats and optionally diff.

skills.name: Get Default Branch
skills.description: Return the default branch and list of protected branches for a repository.

skills.name: Get Branch Rules
skills.description: Return branch protection rules combining provider API data with local policy config.
